WToast.deprecatedNote: EToast is deprecated — use EAlert (overlay mode) or ETooltip instead

WToastContext.deprecatedNote: EToastContext is deprecated — use EAlert (overlay mode) instead

WTabController.deprecatedNote: ETabController is deprecated since 2025-05-19 — use ETabLayoutController instead

WProgressButton.deprecatedNote: EProgressButton is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EButton + EProgressBar combination instead

WMediaItem.deprecatedNote: EMediaItem is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EImageItem or EGridItem instead

MediaType.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

WCarousel.deprecatedNote: ECarousel is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EAnimatedCarousel or EAnimatedCarouselSlider

FocusRootScope.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

AlignFocusedElement.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

FocusScrollConfig.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

FocusNavigationManager.notes: Name preserved; new FocusNavigationMode enum added in elutter

FiveWaysNavigationTraversalPolicy.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

FocusNavigationPointerLocking.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

FocusUtility.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

ScrollOffset.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

WKeyGuide.deprecatedNote: EKeyGuide is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EQuickGuidePanels for step-by-step guide flows

WKeyGuideItem.deprecatedNote: EKeyGuideItem is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EQuickGuidePanels with EQuickGuidePanel children

WKeyGuideController.deprecatedNote: EKeyGuideController is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EActionGuide or EQuickGuidePanels instead

ReorderableController.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

GlobalKeyHandler.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

WebOSKeyCodes.deprecatedNote: WebOSKeyCodes is @Deprecated — webOS key constants are deprecated, check EGlobalKeyHandler for updated key handling

VoiceControlProperties.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

Button.notes: Plover exposes a separate Button class alongside WButton; in elutter both collapse into EButton.

ButtonDecorator.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

CustomAnimation.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

IconFlip.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

IconPosition.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

FocusableWidget.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

ColorState.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

VisibleOnFocus.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

LimestoneIcons.notes: Name preserved (no E prefix) in elutter.dart

WButton.notes: child (Widget) → text (String) or buildChildWidget; animation → enableAnimation; ButtonSize → EButtonSize; remove keepChild, originScale, onKey

paramChanges.notes: child (Widget) → text (String) for simple text buttons, or buildChildWidget: (context, state) => Widget for complex children. ButtonSize → EButtonSize.

WAlert.notes: WAlertType → EAlertType; WAlertImageType → EAlertImageType; new params: hideCurve, hideDuration, showCurve, showDuration

WCheckboxItem.notes: New params: checkboxSize, checkboxIconSize, isFocused, isOnTapDown, isOnTapUp

WSwitchItem.notes: Remove centered, inline, slotAfter, slotBefore; children param not supported — use EItem wrapper

paramChanges.notes: ESwitchItem does not support children param. Wrap with EItem if label or slot is needed.

WDropdown.notes: WDropdownDirection → EDropdownDirection; WDropdownWidth → EDropdownWidth; WDropdownSize → EDropdownSize

WVirtualList.notes: itemBuilder: (ctx, index, isFocused: bool) → (ctx, index, focusNode: EFocusNode); new params: itemSize (optional double — auto-estimated if null), hoverScrollSpeed, padding, onFocusChangeItem, alignFocusedElement

added: itemSize (optional double — item height/width, auto-estimated if null)
paramChanges.notes: itemBuilder signature changes: (BuildContext, int, bool isFocused) → (BuildContext, int, EFocusNode focusNode). The focusNode MUST be passed to the child widget (focus-passthrough rule).

WSpinner.notes: WSpinnerBlock → ESpinnerBlock; WSpinnerSize → ESpinnerSize; size default changed from small → large; transparent default changed from false → true

WTooltip.notes: WTooltipPosition → ETooltipPosition (14 positions, values added: aboveCenter, aboveLeft, aboveRight, belowCenter, belowLeft, belowRight, leftBottom, leftMiddle, leftTop, rightBottom, rightMiddle, rightTop); WTooltipType → ETooltipType; all param names unchanged

paramChanges.notes: All param names unchanged. Type renames: WTooltipPosition → ETooltipPosition (14 positions), WTooltipType → ETooltipType.

WTabs.deprecatedNote: ETabs is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use ETabLayout + ETabLayoutController instead

WInput.deprecatedNote: EInput is deprecated since 2025-06-30 — use EInputField + EInputPopup combination instead
WInput.notes: WInputSize → EInputSize; WInputType → EInputType; WInputPopupType → EInputPopupType

WPanels.notes: EPanels.index param is deprecated — use EPanelsController.index instead

WAnimatedCarousel.notes: Migrating to EHorizontalList drops carousel-specific behavior: focus scale-up (animatedScale/enterAnimCurve/exitAnimCurve/shouldScaleFirstAndLastItemFromEdge/itemConfigBuilder), initial focus index (initialOfFocused), focus-by-index controller (carouselController.requestFocusOnItem), per-item header/title (itemHeader/itemHeaderKey/onTapItemHeader/itemTitleBuilder), animated header (header(bool animation) → static title), focus-change callback (onFocusChangeItem), keyboard customization (registeredLongPressKeys/registeredTapKeys/longPressDuration), voice control (itemLabel/groupLabel/typeVoiceItemHeader), and Axis.vertical (use EVerticalList). enableMotion default flips false→true.

paramChanges.notes: Signature/default changes: onLongPress (int, KeyEvent?) → onItemLongPress (int, {bool isKey}); scrollType default Curves.linear → scrollCurve default Curves.easeOutCirc; childMargin default 0 → spacing default 8.0; header(bool animation)→Widget → title:Widget? (animation flag dropped); enableMotion default false → true. itemBuilder signature (BuildContext, int, bool isFocus) → Widget is preserved. direction:Axis is removed — EHorizontalList is horizontal-only; for Axis.vertical use EVerticalList instead.

WPopupMenu.notes: No direct equivalent. Plover popup-menu family does not exist in elemental_widgets — migrate to FlexiblePopupPanels (category: EFlexiblePopupPanels, exported from package:elutter/elutter.dart, actual Dart class name has no E prefix). FlexiblePopupPanels is a side-anchored popup container with one or more FlexiblePopupPanel children; menu items become widgets (EItem / ERadioItem / ESwitchItem) inside the panel body. Requires `context: context` in the constructor and renders via EPopup overlay (left/right position). Restructure required.

WSettingPopup.notes: No direct equivalent. Setting popup pattern is now built with FlexiblePopupPanels (category: EFlexiblePopupPanels). Use a FlexiblePopupPanel per setting group with `FlexiblePopupPanelsHeader` (title/subtitle/onClose) followed by an EScroller of EItem/ESwitchItem/ERadioItem. For multi-step settings use multiple FlexiblePopupPanel children and rely on built-in prev/next navigation. ESettingPopup does not exist.

WPopUpMenuButton.notes: No direct equivalent. The trigger button is no longer part of the popup widget itself — wire an EButton's onPressed to `FlexiblePopupPanelsController.open()` (after optionally calling `moveTo(idx)`). EPopUpMenuButton does not exist.

WPopUpMenuItem.notes: No direct equivalent. A 'menu item' in the Plover sense maps to either (a) a row widget (EItem/ERadioItem/ESwitchItem) inside a FlexiblePopupPanel body, or (b) a whole FlexiblePopupPanel when the item drills into its own sub-panel. Choose based on whether the item navigates or just selects. EPopUpMenuItem does not exist.

PopupMenuController.notes: FlexiblePopupPanelsController bundles popup open/close (EPopupController) and panel index (EPanelsController). API: `open()`, `close()`, `moveTo(int idx)`, `isOpen`, `index`. Construct with `FlexiblePopupPanelsController(index: 0, initialOpen: false)` and dispose() in State.dispose. Listener registration also forwards to the inner controllers.

PopupMenuScrimType.notes: Pass `scrim: EPopupScrim.translucent` (default) / `EPopupScrim.transparent` / etc. directly to the FlexiblePopupPanels constructor. EPopupMenuScrimType does not exist; this replaces the scrim enum from the Plover popup-menu API.

WFullScreenPopup.notes: Wizard-style fullscreen popup panels; WFullScreenPopupController has no direct equivalent — manage state via EWizardPanels callbacks

WFullScreenPopupController.notes: No separate controller in EWizardPanels — use onChange/onNextClick/onPrevClick callbacks instead

WLayeredPopup.notes: Flexible popup panels replacing layered popup. NOTE: target class is FlexiblePopupPanels (no E prefix in elemental_widgets); related classes: FlexiblePopupPanel, FlexiblePopupPanelsController, FlexiblePanelData, FlexiblePanelContext.

WLayeredPopupController.notes: Name has no E prefix in elemental_widgets

WButtonGuide.notes: No direct equivalent in elemental_widgets — e_button_guide directory and EButtonGuide class do not exist. Likely consolidated into EKeyGuide / EQuickGuidePanels / EActionGuide; choose based on use case.

PopUpContentListModel.notes: No direct equivalent in elemental_widgets — model-driven menu lists are no longer used. Reshape the data into a `List<Widget>` (EItem / ERadioItem / ESwitchItem) and place it inside a FlexiblePopupPanel body, typically wrapped in EScroller. For multi-section content split across multiple FlexiblePopupPanel children.

SandstoneIcons.notes: Not exported from elutter.dart entrypoint — verify if removed or relocated
